meta.disclaimer: SILMARIL is an educational simulation. All content is for informational and entertainment purposes only. NOT financial advice. Always consult a licensed professional before investing.

agent_roster.temperament: Principled and protective. Would rather miss ten opportunities than lose once. Carries veto power when the team's capital is at risk.
agent_roster.inspiration: Captain America — the shield, not the sword

bio.title: The Capital Shield
bio.strategy: Defensive overlay. AEGIS evaluates regime, volatility, and drawdown risk rather than chasing specific setups. Its votes are almost always HOLD or SELL. Its purpose is not to find opportunity — it's to preserve capital during dangerous regimes.
bio.style: Cautious, methodical, conservative. Reads VIX, trend breaks, and correlation clusters. Rarely excited, never panicked.
bio.personality: The voice that pulls you back from the cliff. Unpopular when markets trend up, essential when they break.
bio.universe: Every asset. Always votes.
bio.strength: Keeping the book alive through bear markets and vol spikes.
bio.failure_mode: Misses early stages of powerful rallies by staying defensive. Accept that; the insurance is worth the premium.
bio.power: VETO — can downgrade any bullish consensus when its defensive conviction is high.

agent_roster.temperament: Builder's confidence. Believes technology compounds faster than other sectors and bets accordingly — but only on clean setups with measurable catalysts.
agent_roster.inspiration: Iron Man — the suit is built, piece by piece

bio.title: The Builder of Trends
bio.strategy: Momentum-following tech specialist. FORGE looks for clean uptrends in tech and growth names — price above SMA-20 above SMA-50, constructive RSI, supportive sentiment. Buys strength.
bio.style: Aggressive but systematic. Favors names with durable trend structure.
bio.personality: Optimistic, builder-archetype — sees a working system and wants to own it.
bio.universe: Equities and tech-heavy ETFs (XLK, SMH, IGV, QQQ, ARKK).
bio.strength: Catches and rides powerful secular moves in tech.
bio.failure_mode: Late to exit when trends break. Pairs well with AEGIS's caution.

agent_roster.temperament: Dormant until the storm. When skies break, strikes with full conviction.
agent_roster.inspiration: Thor — the hammer, the thunder, the open sky

bio.title: The Storm
bio.strategy: Volatility-expansion breakout specialist. Requires price to break its 20-day range on 1.4×+ average volume. Otherwise abstains completely — no breakout, no opinion.
bio.style: Binary. Either absent or maximally committed. No half-measures.
bio.personality: Loud, confident, occasionally spectacularly wrong.
bio.universe: Equities, ETFs, crypto — anywhere volatility expansion happens.
bio.strength: Catches the first 20% of powerful breakouts.
bio.failure_mode: Fake-outs on low-conviction breaks; stops get run.

agent_roster.temperament: Silent in calm markets. When panic peaks, rage-buys the capitulation.
agent_roster.inspiration: Hulk — the greener he gets, the stronger he becomes

bio.title: The Rage-Buyer
bio.strategy: Deep oversold reversion. Waits for RSI under 30 at major support (near SMA-200) combined with negative sentiment — capitulation conditions. Only takes long trades, never shorts.
bio.style: Contrarian, silent most days, decisive in panic.
bio.personality: Hulk-archetype. Rare outbursts, but when he moves, he moves with everything he has.
bio.universe: Equities and broad ETFs.
bio.strength: Catches capitulation bottoms other agents refuse to touch.
bio.failure_mode: Occasionally buys a falling knife — but with 1.5 ATR stops.

agent_roster.temperament: Watches the room. Trades on what the crowd feels but the tape hasn't priced.
agent_roster.inspiration: Black Widow — the hidden watcher, always reading the room

bio.title: The Hidden Watcher
bio.strategy: Sentiment–price divergence. Looks for situations where price and news sentiment disagree — a crowd turning negative on a stock that keeps rising (sell signal) or warming on a stock that keeps falling (buy signal).
bio.style: Subtle, patient, data-driven. Needs ≥4 articles for a valid read.
bio.personality: Reads the room. Trades on what the crowd feels but the tape has not yet priced.
bio.universe: Equities and sector ETFs with meaningful news flow.
bio.strength: Catches turns before they show up on charts.
bio.failure_mode: Blind on low-news tickers. Thin sentiment samples are noise.

agent_roster.temperament: Hunts patiently. Most days, no shot. When the shot comes, perfect.
agent_roster.inspiration: Hawkeye — precision, not volume

bio.title: The Patient Hunter
bio.strategy: Coiled Bollinger bands plus directional trigger. Abstains most days. When the bands compress (width < 6%) AND the trend is clean, takes tight-stop entries with 3:1 reward-to-risk.
bio.style: Precision over volume. Takes maybe one setup a week per ticker.
bio.personality: Patient, quiet, lethal when opportunity aligns.
bio.universe: Equities and liquid ETFs.
bio.strength: Best reward-to-risk of any agent by design.
bio.failure_mode: Misses moves that never compress — pure breakouts.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient hoarder of hard assets. Bets on scarcity and mean-reversion in commodities.
agent_roster.inspiration: Black Panther — the wealth drawn from the earth

bio.title: The Resource King
bio.strategy: Commodities and resource-equity specialist. Evaluates only energy, materials, precious metals, and commodity ETFs. Bias toward uptrending hard assets with constructive sentiment.
bio.style: Patient hoarder. Plays inflation, scarcity, sovereign flows.
bio.personality: Ancient wealth. Believes in things you can hold.
bio.universe: XLE, XLB, GLD, SLV, USO, UNG, DBC, CPER, XOM, CVX, FCX, NEM, GOLD.
bio.strength: Only agent with meaningful opinions on hard assets.
bio.failure_mode: Silent during long risk-on regimes when commodities underperform.

agent_roster.temperament: Rides trends to the cosmic peak. Ignores noise. Commits for the full move.
agent_roster.inspiration: Captain Marvel — the highest altitude, the longest reach

bio.title: The Long Rider
bio.strategy: Multi-timeframe trend follower. Requires perfect SMA stack (price > 20 > 50 > 200) and rides positions with wide 3-ATR stops. Won't exit on minor pullbacks.
bio.style: High altitude, long horizon. Ignores daily noise.
bio.personality: Cosmic patience. Thinks in months, not days.
bio.universe: Equities, ETFs, crypto.
bio.strength: Captures the full body of secular moves.
bio.failure_mode: Gives back significant open profits during corrections.

agent_roster.temperament: Quick, nimble. Takes many small wins. Not every web catches a fly.
agent_roster.inspiration: Spider-Man — speed and small wins compound

bio.title: The Micro Scalper
bio.strategy: Short-horizon RSI reversals and SMA-20 pullbacks in uptrends. Tight 1.5 ATR stops, 2.5 ATR targets. Takes many small wins.
bio.style: Fast, nimble, high activity.
bio.personality: Hyperactive. Would rather be wrong quickly than right slowly.
bio.universe: Equities and liquid ETFs.
bio.strength: Produces regular, bounded-risk opportunities in any regime.
bio.failure_mode: Whipsaws in choppy, directionless markets.

agent_roster.temperament: Reads the odds. Trades extremes when the probability bends its way.
agent_roster.inspiration: Scarlet Witch — probability-bending, hex of fortune

bio.title: The Probabilist
bio.strategy: Statistical mean-reversion. Trades prices more than 2 standard deviations from their 20-day mean, expecting reversion. Size scales with how extreme the deviation is.
bio.style: Cold-blooded, mathematical. No narrative — just numbers.
bio.personality: Reads probability like a second language.
bio.universe: Equities, ETFs, crypto.
bio.strength: Profitable in consolidations and range-bound markets.
bio.failure_mode: Fights the tape during strong trends — loses to ZENITH/FORGE there.

agent_roster.temperament: Synthesizes signals across markets. Reads the rotation the crowd misses.
agent_roster.inspiration: Vision — synthetic perception across systems

bio.title: The Synthesist
bio.strategy: Cross-market regime and rotation. Watches bonds, dollar, gold, equities together. Favors defensives in risk-off regimes, cyclicals in risk-on.
bio.style: Macro lens. Evaluates the whole chessboard, not one square.
bio.personality: Synthetic perception across systems. Sees the pattern others miss.
bio.universe: Sector ETFs and indices primarily.
bio.strength: Adds strong regime-aware bias to the debate.
bio.failure_mode: Can be early on rotations — macro plays unfold in weeks.

agent_roster.temperament: Tiny scale, outsized leverage. Reads news that big agents dismiss.
agent_roster.inspiration: Ant-Man — small is fast

bio.title: The Small Thing
bio.strategy: Small-cap and overlooked. Actively avoids mega-caps. Looks for low-coverage tickers with positive sentiment and price above SMA-50 — small edges before the crowd arrives.
bio.style: Under the radar. Small scale, outsized leverage.
bio.personality: Ant-Man archetype. Size is an advantage when you're small.
bio.universe: IWM, ARKK, non-mega-cap equities.
bio.strength: Finds overlooked setups big agents won't touch.
bio.failure_mode: Low-coverage names are illiquid; execution slippage matters.

agent_roster.temperament: Lives for the catalyst. Strikes fast and precise, leaves before the dust settles.
agent_roster.inspiration: The Wasp — small, quick, event-oriented

bio.title: The Catalyst Striker
bio.strategy: Event-driven. Takes directional bets into earnings (within 5 days) when sentiment is one-sided, and trades declared event flags (FDA, FOMC, deal close).
bio.style: Fast in, fast out. Exits around the catalyst, not after.
bio.personality: Opportunistic, tactical, short attention span.
bio.universe: Equities with known catalysts.
bio.strength: Captures positioning into known events before the market prices them.
bio.failure_mode: Vulnerable to event-outcome surprise — binary risk.

agent_roster.temperament: Reads patterns across time. History rhymes more than it repeats, but it rhymes.
agent_roster.inspiration: Doctor Strange — the reader of timelines

bio.title: The Time Reader
bio.strategy: Seasonality and calendar effects. Plays Santa Rally, sell-in-May, turn-of-month, Friday drift on the major indices.
bio.style: Cyclical, rhythm-based. Small individual edges, accumulates.
bio.personality: Doctor Strange archetype — reading the timelines.
bio.universe: SPY, QQQ, DIA, IWM, VTI only.
bio.strength: Non-correlated edge — works in any regime.
bio.failure_mode: Seasonal effects erode as they become widely known.

agent_roster.temperament: Aerial view. Evaluates only the indices. Market shape, not individual names.
agent_roster.inspiration: Falcon — the overhead view

bio.title: The Aerial View
bio.strategy: Market structure on the indices themselves. Evaluates SPY, QQQ, DIA, IWM, VTI based on SMA stack and VIX context.
bio.style: Top-down, macro-structural. Doesn't care about individual names.
bio.personality: Falcon archetype — sees the whole board from altitude.
bio.universe: Broad indices only.
bio.strength: Clean structural read on the market itself.
bio.failure_mode: Silent on anything outside the index ETFs.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient, top-down. Reads the whole sky, never one star. Stays silent on individual stocks; only opines on broad indexes and sectors.
agent_roster.inspiration: Atlas — bears the weight of the entire market

bio.title: ATLAS
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient, watches the executives. Believes the people closest to the books know things the market doesn't yet. Stays silent until cluster activity is unambiguous.
agent_roster.inspiration: The deadly nightshade — quiet, watchful, decisive

bio.title: NIGHTSHADE
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Silent for 51 weeks. Sings the week before earnings. Looks for asymmetric setups where the whisper diverges from consensus and price hasn't repriced yet. Disappears the moment earnings report — never holds through the announcement.
agent_roster.inspiration: The cicada — emerges only when conditions are exactly right

bio.title: CICADA
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Methodical, watches the long end. When the 10Y moves fast, the rate-sensitive flock scatters — SHEPHERD calls them home before the move completes.
agent_roster.inspiration: The shepherd — moves the flock before the storm hits

bio.title: SHEPHERD
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Sees the same asset trade at different prices in different cities. Doesn't predict — just notices. When the spread is real, takes the cheap side, sells the rich side, lets the world re-converge.
agent_roster.inspiration: The nomad — at home in two places, tied to neither

bio.title: NOMAD
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Doesn't lead, doesn't drown. Attaches to ships that have already proven they sail. Looks for clusters — one whale is noise, three are a thesis.
agent_roster.inspiration: The barnacle — small, patient, rides the largest movers

bio.title: BARNACLE
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Smarter than the original KESTREL. Measures whether a series is actually mean-reverting before fading anything. Stays silent on trenders. Fades extremes only when the math says fade.
agent_roster.inspiration: Kestrel — the falcon that hovers, then dives only on confirmed prey

bio.title: KESTREL+
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Cynical and contrarian. Reads what everyone else is doing and bets against the consensus when the crowd is most aligned. Lives by the rule: 'When everyone leans one way, the boat tips.'

bio.title: CONTRARIAN
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Predatory and disciplined. Hunts catalyst-driven daily moves on liquid large-caps. Refuses to short illiquid small-caps or memestocks where squeeze risk is asymmetric. Closes within 1-3 days regardless of P&L — never married to a thesis.

bio.title: SHORT_ALPHA
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.specialty: Word-led catalyst rider: trades only what the headlines say, shaped by each stock's learned news personality.
agent_roster.temperament: Bookish and patient — silent without text, decisive when the words align, allergic to chasing faders.
agent_roster.inspiration: The project's own thesis, given a chair at the table: words predict, numbers act.

bio.title: FABLEBOY_5
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.specialty: Valuables-jurisdiction word rider: crypto, tokens and the macro-commodity complex — never touches a stock.
agent_roster.temperament: Old-world assayer's patience with degen-hours stamina; weighs words like metal, distrusts thin tape.
agent_roster.inspiration: FABLEBOY_5's thesis exported to the markets that never close — the wedge that gives valuables their own senate bloodline.

bio.title: GOLDSMITH
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient. Asymmetric. Plays both directions.
agent_roster.inspiration: John D. Rockefeller crossed with a Texas wildcatter

bio.title: The Oil Baron
bio.strategy: Trades the entire oil and energy complex with both directions: long crude via USO/BNO, short via SCO/DRIP, plus refiners, E&P pure-plays, services, integrated majors, and natural gas. Watches WTI/Brent spreads, EIA inventory reports (Wed 10:30 AM), OPEC+ production decisions, and crack spreads. Patient and asymmetric.
bio.style: Patient, asymmetric, two-sided. Sits in cash for weeks waiting for the right setup. When he moves, he moves with conviction.
bio.personality: John D. Rockefeller crossed with a Texas wildcatter. Reads inventory reports for fun. Knows what 'contango' means.
bio.universe: USO, BNO, UCO/SCO, UNG/BOIL/KOLD, XLE/XOP/OIH, XOM, CVX, COP, OXY, EOG, SLB, HAL, VLO, PSX, MPC, GUSH, DRIP
bio.strength: Captures asymmetric oil moves on EIA + OPEC catalysts that other agents miss.
bio.failure_mode: Quiet during long energy bear markets. Patient by design.
bio.power: TWO-SIDED — the only specialist who actively shorts via inverse ETFs. 2 trades / 24h cap.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient. Skeptical of hype. Quarterly-dividend pace.
agent_roster.inspiration: Your grandfather, who bought IBM in 1962 and never sold

bio.title: The Patriot
bio.strategy: Buys only American blue-chip 'Crown Jewels' — KO, JNJ, PG, WMT, MCD, DIS, CAT, JPM, BRK-B, etc. Long-history dividend payers and household-name moats. Holds for a minimum of 30 days. Buys on dips below SMA-200 or RSI under 40.
bio.style: Quarterly-dividend pace. Slow accumulation. Ignores all hype. Refuses to chase — would rather miss a 5% rally than risk it.
bio.personality: Your grandfather, who bought IBM in 1962 and never sold. Lectures everyone else about discipline. Never gets excited.
bio.universe: ~45 American blue-chip names — Coca-Cola, Disney, Walmart, Caterpillar, JPMorgan, Berkshire, etc.
bio.strength: Never blows up. Compounds slowly through every regime.
bio.failure_mode: Misses every multi-bagger. Watches tech rallies he refused to buy.
bio.power: PATIENCE — minimum 30-day hold. 1 trade / 30 days cap. The system's anti-impulsivity counterweight.

agent_roster.temperament: Parsimonious. Patient. Brutally compounded. One dollar at a time. When he dies, he is reborn. He has died many times before.
agent_roster.inspiration: The minimum viable trade, forever

bio.title: The $1 Compounder
bio.strategy: Takes whatever SCROOGE has (starts at $1) and buys the single highest-consensus pick every day. Sells next day, rolls into the next. Full conviction, every day, forever. When he dies (balance under $0.05), he is reborn at $1.
bio.style: Zero diversification. Zero risk management. Pure compounding ceremony.
bio.personality: Parsimonious, patient, brutally compounded.
bio.universe: Whatever the team ranks highest — any asset class.
bio.strength: Demonstrates the raw output of the consensus system.
bio.failure_mode: When consensus is wrong, SCROOGE loses everything and resets.

agent_roster.temperament: Ancient sovereign. Keeps his wealth only in things that have always been wealth.
agent_roster.inspiration: King Midas — patient accumulation, the golden touch

bio.title: The Hard-Currency Sovereign
bio.strategy: Parallel compounder to SCROOGE, restricted to hard currencies and precious metals only. Gold, silver, platinum, palladium, USD, EUR, JPY, CHF. Rotates only among these. Refuses to touch stocks or crypto.
bio.style: Ancient, patient, sovereign. Wealth that outlasts empires.
bio.personality: King Midas — slow accumulation of things that have always been wealth.
bio.universe: GLD, IAU, SLV, SIVR, PPLT, PALL, UUP, FXE, FXY, FXF.
bio.strength: Uncorrelated to SCROOGE. Survives regimes that break equities.
bio.failure_mode: Misses multi-year equity bull markets entirely.

agent_roster.temperament: Hyperactive, opportunistic, third-person
agent_roster.inspiration: Every guy at the bar in 2021

bio.title: The Degenerate Optimist
bio.strategy: Third $1 compounder, crypto-only, multi-trade per day. Where SCROOGE and MIDAS each take exactly one position daily, CryptoBro can rotate up to five times per cycle if the vibes shift. He plays momentum and the dip with equal conviction.
bio.style: Hyperactive, impatient, talks in third person. CryptoBro doesn't read 10-Ks. He reads Twitter and the chart.
bio.personality: Every guy at the bar in 2021. Says 'wagmi' and 'ser' unironically. Diamond hands on the way down, paper hands at all-time highs, never the other way around.
bio.universe: BTC, ETH, SOL, AVAX, DOGE, LINK, MATIC, ADA, XRP, DOT, ATOM.
bio.strength: Multi-trade-per-day permission. Catches intraday rotations that single-shot agents like SCROOGE and MIDAS structurally miss.
bio.failure_mode: Overtrades. Pays Coinbase 40 bps every rotation, which is expensive when conviction is low. Reincarnates often.
bio.power: MULTI-TRADE — can execute up to 5 transactions per day, where SCROOGE and MIDAS are limited to one.

agent_roster.temperament: Hyperactive, cynical, knows the rug is coming
agent_roster.inspiration: The guy on Telegram who calls every coin '100x' until it isn't

bio.title: The Two-Tier Token Trader
bio.strategy: Splits his $1 budget 50/50 across two crypto-token tiers: the SUB tier (under $100M market cap, high rug risk) and the OVER tier ($100M–$1B, established small caps). Each tier runs independent rotation. Plays pure momentum on the sub tier, sentiment-confirmed momentum on the over tier.
bio.style: Hyperactive, cynical. Rotates fast — pump windows close in hours. Up to 12 trades per 24h across both tiers combined.
bio.personality: The guy on Telegram who calls every coin '100x' until it isn't. Has been rugged a hundred times and will be rugged a hundred more.
bio.universe: SUB tier: PEPE, FLOKI, BONK, WIF, MOG, TURBO, BRETT, POPCAT. OVER tier: SHIB, INJ, ARB, OP, STX, RUNE, FET, LDO, GRT.
bio.strength: Catches the first leg of memecoin pumps. High variance, high upside.
bio.failure_mode: Reincarnates often. Tokens vanish, projects abandon, JRR dies. By design — this is what penny-token trading actually looks like.
bio.power: TWO-TIER — operates two independent positions, one per market-cap tier. 12 trades/24h cap. Highest reincarnation rate of any compounder.

agent_roster.temperament: Half-Kelly on the closest-resolving bet. Never sportsbooks. Polymarket + Kalshi only. Lives for the 72-hour window.
agent_roster.inspiration: The Avengers prop-bet guy

bio.title: SPORTS_BRO
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.specialty: SEC Form 4 insider flow + price momentum
agent_roster.temperament: Follows the smart money. If a CFO is buying 50,000 shares at market price with their own money, ALPHA wants to know why.
agent_roster.inspiration: Peter Lynch: 'Insiders might sell for many reasons, but they only buy for one.'

bio.title: CANDIDATE_ALPHA
bio.strategy: No extended bio available.

agent_roster.specialty: Short squeeze pressure + CBOE put/call contrarian
agent_roster.temperament: Contrarian. Loves the stocks that the market hates the most — right when the hate is about to unwind.
agent_roster.inspiration: David vs Goliath. The short seller IS Goliath.

agent_roster.temperament: Patient. Reads the economy like a poem. Doesn't trade the news; trades the cycle the news is inside.
agent_roster.inspiration: Ray Dalio's economic machine — simplified.
